items.title: ParaRC: Embracing Sub-Packetization for Repair Parallelization in MSR-Coded Storage.
items.abstract: Minimum-storage regenerating (MSR) codes are provably optimal erasure codes that minimize the repair bandwidth (i.e., the amount of traffic being transferred during a repair operation), with the minimum storage redundancy, in distributed storage systems. However, the practical repair performance of MSR codes still has significant room to improve, as the mathematical structure of MSR codes makes their repair operations difficult to parallelize. We present ParaRC, a parallel repair framework for MSR codes. ParaRC exploits the sub-packetization nature of MSR codes to parallelize the repair of sub-blocks and balance the repair load (i.e., the amount of traffic sent or received by a node) across the available nodes. We show that there exists a trade-off between the repair bandwidth and the maximum repair load, and further propose a fast heuristic that approximately minimizes the maximum repair load with limited search time for large coding parameters. We prototype our heuristic in ParaRC and show that ParaRC reduces the degraded read and full-node recovery times over the conventional centralized repair approach in MSR codes by up to 59.3% and 39.2%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 最小存储再生（MSR）码是经过证明的最佳纠删码，它可以在分布式存储系统中最小化修复带宽（即修复操作期间传输的流量），并具有最小的存储冗余。然而，MSR 代码的实际修复性能仍然有很大的改进空间，因为 MSR 代码的数学结构使其修复操作难以并行化。我们提出了 ParaRC，一个 MSR 代码的并行修复框架。 ParaRC 利用 MSR 代码的子分组特性来并行化子块的修复并平衡可用节点之间的修复负载（即节点发送或接收的流量量）。我们证明修复带宽和最大修复负载之间存在权衡，并进一步提出了一种快速启发式，可以在有限的搜索时间下对大编码参数近似最小化最大修复负载。我们在 ParaRC 中对启发式进行了原型设计，结果表明，与 MSR 代码中的传统集中式修复方法相比，ParaRC 分别将降级读取和全节点恢复时间减少了 59.3% 和 39.2%。

items.title: Unsafe at Any Copy: Name Collisions from Mixing Case Sensitivities.
items.abstract: File name confusion attacks, such as malicious symlinks and file squatting, have long been studied as sources of security vulnerabilities. However, a recently emerged type, i.e., case-sensitivity-induced name collisions, has not been scrutinized. These collisions are introduced by differences in name resolution under case-sensitive and case-insensitive file systems or directories. A prominent example is the recent Git vulnerability (CVE-2021-21300) which can lead to code execution on a victim client when it clones a maliciously crafted repository onto a case-insensitive file system. With trends including ext4 adding support for per-directory case-insensitivity and the broad deployment of the Windows Subsystem for Linux, the prerequisites for such vulnerabilities are increasingly likely to exist even in a single system. In this paper, we make a first effort to investigate how and where the lack of any uniform approach to handling name collisions leads to a diffusion of responsibility and resultant vulnerabilities. Interestingly, we demonstrate the existence of a range of novel security challenges arising from name collisions and their inconsistent handling by low-level utilities and applications. Specifically, our experiments show that utilities handle many name collision scenarios unsafely, leaving the responsibility to applications whose developers are unfortunately not yet aware of the threats. We examine three case studies as a first step towards systematically understanding the emerging type of name collision vulnerability.
items.abstract_zh: 文件名混淆攻击（例如恶意符号链接和文件抢注）长期以来一直被视为安全漏洞的来源。然而，最近出现的一种类型，即区分大小写引起的名称冲突，尚未得到仔细审查。这些冲突是由区分大小写和不区分大小写的文件系统或目录下的名称解析差异引起的。一个突出的例子是最近的 Git 漏洞 (CVE-2021-21300)，当受害者客户端将恶意制作的存储库克隆到不区分大小写的文件系统时，该漏洞可能会导致受害者客户端执行代码。随着 ext4 添加对每个目录不区分大小写的支持以及适用于 Linux 的 Windows 子系统的广泛部署等趋势，此类漏洞的先决条件甚至在单个系统中也越来越有可能存在。在本文中，我们首先努力调查缺乏处理名称冲突的统一方法如何以及在何处导致责任扩散和由此产生的漏洞。有趣的是，我们证明了由于名称冲突及其低级实用程序和应用程序的不一致处理而引起的一系列新的安全挑战的存在。具体来说，我们的实验表明，实用程序不安全地处理许多名称冲突场景，将责任留给了应用程序，不幸的是，这些应用程序的开发人员尚未意识到威胁。我们研究了三个案例研究，作为系统了解新兴类型的名称冲突漏洞的第一步。

items.title: Citron: Distributed Range Lock Management with One-sided RDMA.
items.abstract: Range lock enables concurrent accesses to disjoint parts of a shared storage. However, existing range lock managers rely on centralized CPU resources to process lock requests, which results in server-side CPU bottleneck and suboptimal performance when placed in a distributed scenario. We propose Citron, an RDMA-enabled distributed range lock manager that bypasses server-side CPUs by using only one-sided RDMA in range lock acquisition and release paths. Citron manages range locks with a static data structure called segment tree, which effectively accommodates dynamically located and sized ranges but only requires limited and nearly constant synchronization costs from the clients. Citron can also scale up itself in microseconds to adapt to a shared storage of a growing size at runtime. Evaluation shows that under various workloads, Citron delivers up to 3.05× throughput and 76.4% lower tail latency than CPU-based approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 范围锁允许对共享存储的不相交部分进行并发访问。然而，现有的范围锁管理器依赖集中式CPU资源来处理锁请求，这导致在分布式场景中出现服务器端CPU瓶颈和性能次优。我们提出了 Citron，这是一种支持 RDMA 的分布式范围锁定管理器，它通过在范围锁定获取和释放路径中仅使用单侧 RDMA 来绕过服务器端 CPU。 Citron 使用称为段树的静态数据结构来管理范围锁，该结构有效地适应动态定位和调整大小的范围，但只需要客户端有限且几乎恒定的同步成本。 Citron 还可以在微秒内进行自我扩展，以适应运行时大小不断增长的共享存储。评估表明，在各种工作负载下，Citron 的吞吐量比基于 CPU 的方法提高了 3.05 倍，尾部延迟降低了 76.4%。

items.title: HadaFS: A File System Bridging the Local and Shared Burst Buffer for Exascale Supercomputers.
items.abstract: Current supercomputers introduce SSDs to form a Burst Buffer (BB) layer to meet the HPC application’s growing I/O requirements. BBs can be divided into two types by deployment location. One is the local BB, which is known for its scalability and performance. The other is the shared BB, which has the advantage of data sharing and deployment costs. How to unify the advantages of the local BB and the shared BB is a key issue in the HPC community. We propose a novel BB file system named HadaFS that provides the advantages of local BB deployments to shared BB deployments. First, HadaFS offers a new Localized Triage Architecture (LTA) to solve the problem of ultra-scale expansion and data sharing. Then, HadaFS proposes a full-path indexing approach with three metadata synchronization strategies to solve the problem of complex metadata management of traditional file systems and mismatch with the application I/O behaviors. Moreover, HadaFS integrates a data management tool named Hadash, which supports efficient data query in the BB and accelerates data migration between the BB and traditional HPC storage. HadaFS has been deployed on the Sunway New-generation Supercomputer (SNS), serving hundreds of applications and supporting a maximum of 600,000-client scaling.
items.abstract_zh: 当前的超级计算机引入SSD来形成突发缓冲区（BB）层，以满足HPC应用程序不断增长的I/O需求。 BB按部署位置可分为两种类型。一种是本地BB，以其可扩展性和性能着称。另一种是共享BB，其优点是数据共享和部署成本。如何统一本地BB和共享BB的优势是HPC社区的一个关键问题。我们提出了一种名为 HadaFS 的新型 BB 文件系统，它提供了本地 BB 部署与共享 BB 部署的优势。首先，HadaFS提供了新的本地化分类架构（LTA）来解决超大规模扩展和数据共享的问题。然后，HadaFS提出了一种具有三种元数据同步策略的全路径索引方法，以解决传统文件系统元数据管理复杂以及与应用程序I/O行为不匹配的问题。此外，HadaFS还集成了Hadash数据管理工具，支持BB内的高效数据查询，加速BB与传统HPC存储之间的数据迁移。 HadaFS已部署在神威新一代超级计算机（SNS）上，服务于数百个应用程序，支持最大60万客户端扩展。

items.title: Practical Design Considerations for Wide Locally Recoverable Codes (LRCs).
items.abstract: Most of the data in large-scale storage clusters is erasure coded. At exascale, optimizing erasure codes for low storage overhead, efficient reconstruction, and easy deployment is of critical importance. Locally recoverable codes (LRCs) have deservedly gained central importance in this field, because they can balance many of these requirements. In our work we study wide LRCs; LRCs with large number of blocks per stripe and low storage overhead. These codes are a natural next step for practitioners to unlock higher storage savings, but they come with their own challenges. Of particular interest is their reliability , since wider stripes are prone to more simultaneous failures. We conduct a practically-minded analysis of several popular and novel LRCs. We find that wide LRC reliability is a subtle phenomenon that is sensitive to several design choices, some of which are overlooked by theoreticians, and others by practitioners. Based on these insights, we construct novel LRCs called Uniform Cauchy LRCs , which show excellent performance in simulations, and a 33% improvement in reliability on unavailability events observed by a wide LRC deployed in a Google storage cluster. We also show that these codes are easy to deploy in a manner that improves their robustness to common maintenance events. Along the way, we also give a remarkably simple and novel construction of distance optimal LRCs (other constructions are also known), which may be of interest to theory-minded readers.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模存储集群中的大部分数据都是纠删码的。在百亿亿级计算中，优化纠删码以实现低存储开销、高效重建和易于部署至关重要。本地可恢复代码（LRC）在该领域理所当然地获得了核心重要性，因为它们可以平衡许多这些要求。在我们的工作中，我们研究了广泛的 LRC； LRC 每个条带具有大量块且存储开销低。这些代码是从业者释放更高存储节省的自然下一步，但它们也面临着自己的挑战。特别值得关注的是它们的可靠性，因为较宽的条带容易同时发生更多故障。我们对几个流行的新颖的 LRC 进行了务实的分析。我们发现，宽 LRC 可靠性是一种微妙的现象，对多种设计选择敏感，其中一些被理论家忽视，另一些被实践者忽视。基于这些见解，我们构建了称为统一柯西 LRC 的新型 LRC，它在模拟中表现出出色的性能，并且将部署在 Google 存储集群中的广泛 LRC 观察到的不可用事件的可靠性提高了 33%。我们还表明，这些代码易于部署，从而提高了它们对常见维护事件的鲁棒性。在此过程中，我们还给出了一种非常简单且新颖的距离最优 LRC 构造（其他构造也是已知的），这可能会引起理论读者的兴趣。

items.title: SHADE: Enable Fundamental Cacheability for Distributed Deep Learning Training.
items.abstract: Deep learning training (DLT) applications exhibit unique I/O workload behaviors that pose new challenges for storage system design. DLT is I/O intensive since data samples need to be fetched continuously from a remote storage. Accelerators such as GPUs have been extensively used to support these applications. As accelerators become more powerful and more data-hungry, the I/O performance lags behind. This creates a crucial performance bottleneck, especially in distributed DLT. At the same time, the exponentially growing dataset sizes make it impossible to store these datasets entirely in memory. While today's DLT frameworks typically use a random sampling policy that treat all samples uniformly equally, recent findings indicate that not all samples are equally important and different data samples contribute differently towards improving the accuracy of a model. This observation creates an opportunity for DLT I/O optimizations by exploiting the data locality enabled by importance sampling. To this end, we design and implement SHADE, a new DLT-aware caching system that detects fine-grained importance variations at per-sample level and leverages the variance to make informed caching decisions for a distributed DLT job. SHADE adopts a novel, rank-based approach, which captures the relative importance of data samples across different minibatches. SHADE then dynamically updates the importance scores of all samples during training. With these techniques, SHADE manages to significantly improve the cache hit ratio of the DLT job, and thus, improves the job's training performance. Evaluation with representative computer vision (CV) models shows that SHADE, with a small cache, improves the cache hit ratio by up to 4.5 times compared to the LRU caching policy.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习训练 (DLT) 应用程序表现出独特的 I/O 工作负载行为，这给存储系统设计带来了新的挑战。 DLT 是 I/O 密集型，因为需要从远程存储中连续获取数据样本。 GPU 等加速器已被广泛用于支持这些应用程序。随着加速器变得更强大、更需要数据，I/O 性能会落后。这造成了一个关键的性能瓶颈，尤其是在分布式 DLT 中。同时，呈指数增长的数据集大小使得不可能将这些数据集完全存储在内存中。虽然当今的 DLT 框架通常使用随机抽样策略，对所有样本一视同仁，但最近的研究结果表明，并非所有样本都同等重要，并且不同的数据样本对提高模型准确性的贡献不同。这一观察结果通过利用重要性采样实现的数据局部性，为 DLT I/O 优化创造了机会。为此，我们设计并实现了 SHADE，这是一种新的 DLT 感知缓存系统，可检测每个样本级别的细粒度重要性变化，并利用该差异为分布式 DLT 作业做出明智的缓存决策。 SHADE 采用一种新颖的、基于排名的方法，该方法可以捕获不同小批量数据样本的相对重要性。然后，SHADE 在训练期间动态更新所有样本的重要性分数。通过这些技术，SHADE 显着提高了 DLT 作业的缓存命中率，从而提高了作业的训练性能。对代表性计算机视觉（CV）模型的评估表明，SHADE在小缓存的情况下，与LRU缓存策略相比，缓存命中率提高了4.5倍。

items.title: Integrated Host-SSD Mapping Table Management for Improving User Experience of Smartphones.
items.abstract: Host Performance Booster (HPB) was proposed to improve the performance of high-capacity mobile flash storage systems by utilizing unused host DRAM memory. In this paper, we investigate how HPB should be managed so that the user experience of smartphones can be enhanced from HPB-enabled high-performance mobile storage systems. From our empirical study on Android environments, we identified two requirements for an efficient HPB management scheme in smartphones. First, HPB should be managed in a foreground app-centric manner so that the user-perceived latency can be greatly reduced. Second, the capacity of the HPB memory should be dynamically adjusted so as not to degrade the user experience of the foreground app. As an efficient HPB management solution that meets the identified requirements, we propose an integrated host-SSD mapping table management scheme, HPBvalve, for smartphones. HPBvalve prioritizes the foreground app in managing mapping table entries in the HPB memory. HPBvalve dynamically resizes the overall capacity of the HPB memory depending on the memory pressure status of the smartphone. Our experimental results using the prototype implementation demonstrate that HPBvalve improves UX-critical app launching time by up to 43% (250 ms) over the existing HPB management scheme, without negatively affecting memory pressure. Meanwhile, the L2P mapping misses are alleviated by up to 78%.
items.abstract_zh: 主机性能助推器（HPB）被提出来通过利用未使用的主机 DRAM 内存来提高大容量移动闪存存储系统的性能。在本文中，我们研究了如何管理 HPB，以便可以通过支持 HPB 的高性能移动存储系统来增强智能手机的用户体验。根据我们对 Android 环境的实证研究，我们确定了智能手机中高效 HPB 管理方案的两个要求。首先，HPB应该以前台应用程序为中心的方式进行管理，这样可以大大减少用户感知的延迟。其次，HPB内存的容量应该动态调整，以免降低前台应用的用户体验。作为满足既定要求的高效HPB管理解决方案，我们提出了一种适用于智能手机的集成主机-SSD映射表管理方案HPBvalve。 HPBvalve 在管理 HPB 内存中的映射表条目时优先考虑前台应用程序。 HPBvalve 根据智能手机的内存压力状态动态调整 HPB 内存的总体容量。我们使用原型实现的实验结果表明，与现有 HPB 管理方案相比，HPBvalve 将用户体验关键型应用程序启动时间缩短了 43%（250 毫秒），并且不会对内存压力产生负面影响。同时，L2P 映射缺失减少高达 78%。

items.title: NVMeVirt: A Versatile Software-defined Virtual NVMe Device.
items.abstract: There have been drastic changes in the storage device landscape recently. At the center of the diverse storage landscape lies the NVMe interface, which allows high-performance and flexible communication models required by these next-generation device types. However, its hardware-oriented definition and specification are bottlenecking the development and evaluation cycle for new revolutionary storage devices. In this paper, we present NVMeVirt, a novel approach to facilitate software-defined NVMe devices. A user can define any NVMe device type with custom features, and NVMeVirt allows it to bridge the gap between the host I/O stack and the virtual NVMe device in software. We demonstrate the advantages and features of NVMeVirt by realizing various storage types and configurations, such as conventional SSDs, low-latency high-bandwidth NVM SSDs, zoned namespace SSDs, and key-value SSDs with the support of PCI peer-to-peer DMA and NVMe-oF target offloading. We also make cases for storage research with NVMeVirt, such as studying the performance characteristics of database engines and extending the NVMe specification for the improved key-value SSD performance.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，存储设备格局发生了巨大变化。 NVMe 接口位于多样化存储格局的中心，它支持这些下一代设备类型所需的高性能和灵活的通信模型。然而，其面向硬件的定义和规范正在成为新的革命性存储设备的开发和评估周期的瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了 NVMeVirt，这是一种促进软件定义 NVMe 设备的新颖方法。用户可以使用自定义功能定义任何 NVMe 设备类型，NVMeVirt 允许它在软件中弥合主机 I/O 堆栈和虚拟 NVMe 设备之间的差距。我们通过实现各种存储类型和配置来展示 NVMeVirt 的优势和特性，例如传统 SSD、低延迟高带宽 NVM SSD、分区命名空间 SSD 以及支持 PCI 点对点 DMA 和 NVMe-oF 目标卸载的键值 SSD。我们还利用 NVMeVirt 进行存储研究，例如研究数据库引擎的性能特征以及扩展 NVMe 规范以提高键值 SSD 性能。

items.title: InftyDedup: Scalable and Cost-Effective Cloud Tiering with Deduplication.
items.abstract: Cloud tiering is the process of moving selected data from on-premise storage to the cloud, which has recently become important for backup solutions. As subsequent backups usually contain repeating data, deduplication in cloud tiering can significantly reduce cloud storage utilization, and hence costs. In this paper, we introduce InftyDedup, a novel system for cloud tiering with deduplication. Unlike existing solutions, it maximizes scalability by utilizing cloud services not only for storage but also for computation. Following a distributed batch approach with dynamically assigned cloud computation resources, InftyDedup can deduplicate multi-petabyte backups from multiple sources at costs on the order of a couple of dollars. Moreover, by selecting between hot and cold cloud storage based on the characteristics of each data chunk, our solution further reduces the overall costs by up to 26%–44%. InftyDedup is implemented in a state-of-the-art commercial backup system and evaluated in the cloud of a hyperscaler.
items.abstract_zh: 云分层是将选定数据从本地存储移动到云的过程，这最近对于备份解决方案变得非常重要。由于后续备份通常包含重复数据，云分层中的重复数据删除可以显着降低云存储利用率，从而降低成本。在本文中，我们介绍了 InftyDedup，这是一种具有重复数据删除功能的云分层新型系统。与现有解决方案不同，它不仅利用云服务进行存储，而且还进行计算，从而最大限度地提高可扩展性。采用动态分配云计算资源的分布式批处理方法，InftyDedup 可以以几美元的成本从多个来源删除多 PB 备份的重复数据。此外，通过根据每个数据块的特征选择热云存储和冷云存储，我们的解决方案进一步将总体成本降低了26%–44%。 InftyDedup 在最先进的商业备份系统中实施，并在超大规模企业的云中进行评估。

items.title: ROLEX: A Scalable RDMA-oriented Learned Key-Value Store for Disaggregated Memory Systems.
items.abstract: Disaggregated memory systems separate monolithic servers into different components, including compute and memory nodes, to enjoy the benefits of high resource utilization, flexible hardware scalability, and efficient data sharing. By exploiting the high-performance RDMA (Remote Direct Memory Access), the compute nodes directly access the remote memory pool without involving remote CPUs. Hence, the ordered key-value (KV) stores (e.g., B-trees and learned indexes) keep all data sorted to provide rang query service via the high-performance network. However, existing ordered KVs fail to work well on the disaggregated memory systems, due to either consuming multiple network roundtrips to search the remote data or heavily relying on the memory nodes equipped with insufficient computing resources to process data modifications. In this paper, we propose a scalable RDMA-oriented KV store with learned indexes, called ROLEX, to coalesce the ordered KV store in the disaggregated systems for efficient data storage and retrieval. ROLEX leverages a retraining-decoupled learned index scheme to dissociate the model retraining from data modification operations via adding a bias and some data-movement constraints to learned models. Based on the operation decoupling, data modifications are directly executed in compute nodes via one-sided RDMA verbs with high scalability. The model retraining is hence removed from the critical path of data modification and asynchronously executed in memory nodes by using dedicated computing resources. Our experimental results on YCSB and real-world workloads demonstrate that ROLEX achieves competitive performance on the static workloads, as well as significantly improving the performance on dynamic workloads by up to 2.2 times than state-of-the-art schemes on the disaggregated memory systems. We have released the open-source codes for public use in GitHub.
items.abstract_zh: 分解的内存系统将单片服务器分成不同的组件，包括计算和内存节点，以享受高资源利用率、灵活的硬件可扩展性和高效的数据共享的好处。通过利用高性能RDMA（远程直接内存访问），计算节点可以直接访问远程内存池，而不需要远程CPU的参与。因此，有序键值（KV）存储（例如，B树和学习索引）使所有数据保持排序，以通过高性能网络提供范围查询服务。然而，现有的有序 KV 无法在分解的内存系统上很好地工作，因为要么消耗多次网络往返来搜索远程数据，要么严重依赖配备不足计算资源的内存节点来处理数据修改。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有学习索引的可扩展的面向 RDMA 的 KV 存储，称为 ROLEX，以合并分类系统中的有序 KV 存储，以实现高效的数据存储和检索。 ROLEX 利用重新训练解耦的学习索引方案，通过向学习模型添加偏差和一些数据移动约束，将模型重新训练与数据修改操作分离。基于操作解耦，数据修改通过单侧RDMA动词直接在计算节点中执行，具有高可扩展性。因此，模型重新训练从数据修改的关键路径中移除，并通过使用专用计算资源在内存节点中异步执行。我们在 YCSB 和实际工作负载上的实验结果表明，ROLEX 在静态工作负载上实现了具有竞争力的性能，并且在动态工作负载上的性能显着提高，比分解内存系统上最先进的方案提高了 2.2 倍。我们已在 GitHub 上发布了开源代码供公众使用。

items.title: Fisc: A Large-scale Cloud-native-oriented File System.
items.abstract: The wide adoption of Cloud Native shifts the boundary between cloud users and CSPs (Cloud Service Providers) from VM-based infrastructure to container-based applications. However, traditional file systems face challenges. First, the traditional file system (eg, Tectonic, Colossus, HDFS) clients are sophisticated and compete with the scarce resources in the application containers. Second, it is challenging for CSP to help the I/O pass from the containers to the storage clusters while guaranteeing their security, availability, and performance. To provide file system service for cloud-native applications, we design \system{}, a cloud-native-oriented file system. \system{}~ introduces four key designs: 1) a lightweight file system client in the container, 2) a DPU-based virtio-\system{}~device to implement the hardware offloading, 3) a storage-aware mechanism to address the I/O to the storage node to improve the I/O's availability and realizes local read, 4) a full path QoS mechanism to guarantee the QoS of hybrid deployed applications. \system{} has been deployed in production for over three years. It now serves cloud-native applications running over 3 million cores. Results show that \system{}~client only consumes 80% CPU resources compared to the traditional file system client. The production environment shows that the online searching task's latency is less than 500 $\mu$s when accessing the remote storage cluster.
items.abstract_zh: 云原生的广泛采用将云用户和 CSP（云服务提供商）之间的边界从基于 VM 的基础设施转移到基于容器的应用程序。然而，传统的文件系统面临着挑战。首先，传统文件系统（例如，Tectonic、Colossus、HDFS）客户端非常复杂，并且与应用程序容器中的稀缺资源竞争。其次，CSP如何帮助I/O从容器传递到存储集群，同时保证其安全性、可用性和性能是一个挑战。为了给云原生应用提供文件系统服务，我们设计了一个面向云原生的文件系统\system{}。 \system{}~ 引入了四个关键设计：1）容器中的轻量级文件系统客户端，2）基于 DPU 的 virtio-\system{}~device 来实现硬件卸载，3）存储感知机制，将 I/O 寻址到存储节点，以提高 I/O 的可用性并实现本地读取，4）全路径 QoS 机制，以保证混合部署应用程序的 QoS。 \system{} 已在生产环境中部署了三年多。它现在为运行超过 300 万个核心的云原生应用程序提供服务。结果表明，与传统文件系统客户端相比，\system{}~client 仅消耗 80% 的 CPU 资源。生产环境显示，在线搜索任务访问远程存储集群时延低于500$\mu$s。

items.title: More Than Capacity: Performance-oriented Evolution of Pangu in Alibaba.
items.abstract: This paper presents how the Pangu storage system continuously evolves with hardware technologies and the business model to provide high-performance, reliable storage services with a 100-microsecond level of I/O latency. Pangu’s evolution includes two phases. In the first phase, Pangu embraces the emergence of the solid-state drive (SSD) storage and remote direct memory access (RDMA) network technologies by innovating its file system and designing a user-space storage operating system to substantially reduce the I/O latency while providing high throughput and IOPS. In the second phase, Pangu evolves from a volume-oriented storage provider to a performance-oriented one. To adapt to this change of business model, Pangu upgrades its infrastructure with storage servers of much higher SSD volume and RDMA bandwidth from 25Gbps to 100Gbps. It introduces a series of key designs, including traffic amplification reduction, remote direct cache access, and CPU computation offloading, to ensure Pangu fully harvests the performance improvement brought by hardware upgrade. Other than introducing these technology innovations, we also share our operating experiences during Pangu’s evolution, and discuss important lessons learned from them.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了盘古存储系统如何随着硬件技术和商业模式的不断演进，提供高性能、可靠、I/O延迟达到100微秒级的存储服务。盘古的演化包括两个阶段。在第一阶段，盘古通过创新文件系统和设计用户空间存储操作系统来拥抱固态硬盘（SSD）存储和远程直接内存访问（RDMA）网络技术的出现，以大幅减少I/O延迟，同时提供高吞吐量和IOPS。第二阶段，盘古从面向卷的存储提供商演变为面向性能的存储提供商。为了适应这种商业模式的变化，盘古升级了其基础设施，使用了更高SSD容量的存储服务器和RDMA带宽从25Gbps到100Gbps。引入了降低流量放大、远程直接缓存访问、CPU计算分流等一系列关键设计，确保盘古充分收获硬件升级带来的性能提升。除了介绍这些技术创新之外，我们还分享了盘古演化过程中的运营经验，并讨论了其中的重要教训。

items.title: Intelligent Resource Scheduling for Co-located Latency-critical Services: A Multi-Model Collaborative Learning Approach.
items.abstract: Latency-critical services have been widely deployed in cloud environments. For cost-efficiency, multiple services are usually co-located on a server. Thus, run-time resource scheduling becomes the pivot for QoS control in these complicated co-location cases. However, the scheduling exploration space enlarges rapidly with the increasing server resources, making the schedulers hardly provide ideal solutions quickly. More importantly, we observe that there are “resource cliffs” in the scheduling exploration space. They affect the exploration efficiency and always lead to severe QoS fluctuations in previous schedulers. To address these problems, we propose a novel ML-based intelligent scheduler – OSML. It learns the correlation between architectural hints (e.g., IPC, cache misses, memory footprint, etc.), scheduling solutions and the QoS demands based on a data set we collected from 11 widely deployed services running on off-the-shelf servers. OSML employs multiple ML models to work collaboratively to predict QoS variations, shepherd the scheduling, and recover from QoS violations in complicated co-location cases. OSML can intelligently avoid resource cliffs during scheduling and reach an optimal solution much faster than previous approaches for co-located LC services. Experimental results show that OSML supports higher loads and meets QoS targets with lower scheduling overheads and shorter convergence time than previous studies.
items.abstract_zh: 延迟关键型服务已广泛部署在云环境中。为了提高成本效率，多个服务通常位于一台服务器上。因此，在这些复杂的共置情况下，运行时资源调度成为 QoS 控制的关键。然而，随着服务器资源的增加，调度探索空间迅速扩大，使得调度器很难快速提供理想的解决方案。更重要的是，我们观察到调度探索空间中存在“资源悬崖”。它们影响探索效率并且总是导致先前调度器的严重QoS波动。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于机器学习的智能调度器——OSML。它根据我们从在现成服务器上运行的 11 个广泛部署的服务收集的数据集，了解架构提示（例如，IPC、缓存未命中、内存占用等）、调度解决方案和 QoS 需求之间的相关性。 OSML 采用多个 ML 模型协同工作，以预测 QoS 变化、引导调度，并在复杂的共置情况下从 QoS 违规中恢复。 OSML 可以智能地避免调度期间的资源悬崖，并比以前的共址 LC 服务方法更快地找到最佳解决方案。实验结果表明，与之前的研究相比，OSML 支持更高的负载并满足 QoS 目标，同时具有更低的调度开销和更短的收敛时间。

items.title: Perseus: A Fail-Slow Detection Framework for Cloud Storage Systems.
items.abstract: The newly-emerging ''fail-slow'' failures plague both software and hardware where the victim components are still functioning yet with degraded performance. To address this problem, this paper presents Perseus, a practical fail-slow detection framework for storage devices. Perseus leverages a light regression-based model to fast pinpoint and analyze fail-slow failures at the granularity of drives. Within a 10-month close monitoring on 248K drives, Perseus managed to find 304 fail-slow cases. Isolating them can reduce the (node-level) 99.99th tail latency by 48%. We assemble a large-scale fail-slow dataset (including 41K normal drives and 315 verified fail-slow drives) from our production traces, based on which we provide root cause analysis on fail-slow drives covering a variety of ill-implemented scheduling, hardware defects, and environmental factors. We have released the dataset to the public for fail-slow study.
items.abstract_zh: 新出现的“慢速失败”故障同时困扰着软件和硬件，其中受害组件仍在运行，但性能下降。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了 Perseus，一种实用的存储设备故障缓慢检测框架。 Perseus 利用基于轻型回归的模型来快速查明和分析驱动器粒度的慢速故障。在对 248K 驱动器进行 10 个月的密切监控后，Perseus 成功发现了 304 个故障缓慢案例。隔离它们可以将（节点级）第 99.99 尾延迟减少 48%。我们根据生产轨迹组装了一个大规模的fail-slow数据集（包括41K正常驱动器和315个经过验证的fail-slow驱动器），基于该数据集，我们提供了fail-slow驱动器的根本原因分析，涵盖了各种实施不当的调度、硬件缺陷和环境因素。我们已向公众发布了数据集以进行慢速失败研究。

items.title: ConfD: Analyzing Configuration Dependencies of File Systems for Fun and Profit.
items.abstract: File systems play an essential role in modern society for managing precious data. To meet diverse needs, they often support many configuration parameters. Such flexibility comes at the price of additional complexity which can lead to subtle configuration-related issues. To address this challenge, we study the configuration-related issues of two major file systems (i.e., Ext4 and XFS) in depth, and identify a prevalent pattern called multilevel configuration dependencies. Based on the study, we build an extensible tool called ConfD to extract the dependencies automatically, and create six plugins to address different configuration-related issues. Our experiments on Ext4 and XFS show that ConfD can extract more than 150 configuration dependencies for the file systems with a low false positive rate. Moreover, the dependency-guided plugins can identify various configuration issues (e.g., mishandling of configurations, regression test failures induced by valid configurations).
items.abstract_zh: 文件系统在现代社会管理珍贵数据方面发挥着重要作用。为了满足不同的需求，它们通常支持许多配置参数。这种灵活性是以额外的复杂性为代价的，这可能会导致微妙的配置相关问题。为了应对这一挑战，我们深入研究了两个主要文件系统（即 Ext4 和 XFS）的配置相关问题，并确定了一种称为多级配置依赖关系的流行模式。基于研究，我们构建了一个名为 ConfD 的可扩展工具来自动提取依赖项，并创建了六个插件来解决不同的配置相关问题。我们在 Ext4 和 XFS 上的实验表明，ConfD 可以以较低的误报率提取文件系统的 150 多个配置依赖项。此外，依赖项引导的插件可以识别各种配置问题（例如，配置处理不当、有效配置引起的回归测试失败）。

items.title: CJFS: Concurrent Journaling for Better Scalability.
items.abstract: In this paper, we propose CJFS, \emph{Concurrent Journaling Filesystem}. CJFS extends EXT4 filesystem and addresses the fundamental limitations of the EXT4 journaling design, which are the main cause for the poor scalability of EXT4 filesystem. The heavy-weight EXT4 journal suffers from two limitations. First, the journal commit is a strictly serial activity. Second, the journal commit uses the original page cache entry, not the copy of it, and subsequently any access to the in-flight page cache entry is blocked. To address these limitations, we propose four techniques, namely Dual Thread Journaling, Multi-version Shadow Paging, Opportunistic Coalescing, and Compound Flush. With Dual Thread design, CJFS can commit a transaction before the preceding journal commit finishes. With Multi-version Shadow Paging, CJFS can be free from the transaction conflict even though there can exist multiple committing transactions. With Opportunistic Coalescing, CJFS can mitigate the transaction lock-up overhead in journal commit so that it can increase the coalescing degree -- i.e., the number of system calls associated with a single transaction -- of a running transaction. With Compound Flush, CJFS minimizes the number of flush calls. CJFS improves the throughput by 81%, 68% and 125% in filebench varmail, dbench, and OLTP-Insert on MySQL, respectively, against EXT4 by removing the transaction conflict and lock-up overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 CJFS，\emph{并发日志文件系统}。 CJFS 扩展了 EXT4 文件系统并解决了 EXT4 日志设计的基本限制，这些限制是 EXT4 文件系统可扩展性差的主要原因。重量级 EXT4 期刊有两个限制。首先，日志提交是严格的串行活动。其次，日志提交使用原始页面缓存条目，而不是其副本，随后对正在进行的页面缓存条目的任何访问都会被阻止。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了四种技术，即双线程日志、多版本影子分页、机会合并和复合刷新。通过双线程设计，CJFS 可以在前面的日志提交完成之前提交事务。通过多版本影子分页，即使可能存在多个提交事务，CJFS也可以免受事务冲突的影响。通过机会合并，CJFS 可以减轻日志提交中的事务锁定开销，从而可以增加正在运行的事务的合并程度（即与单个事务关联的系统调用数量）。通过复合刷新，CJFS 最大限度地减少了刷新调用的数量。通过消除事务冲突和锁定开销，CJFS 相对于 EXT4，分别将 MySQL 上的 filebench varmail、dbench 和 OLTP-Insert 的吞吐量提高了 81%、68% 和 125%。

items.title: TENET: Memory Safe and Fault Tolerant Persistent Transactional Memory.
items.abstract: Byte-addressable Non-Volatile Memory (NVM) allows programs to directly access storage using memory interface without going through the expensive conventional storage stack. However, direct access to NVM makes the NVM data vulnerable to software memory bugs (memory safety) and hardware errors (fault tolerance). This issue is critical because, unlike DRAM, corrupted data can persist forever, even after the system restart. Albeit the plethora of research on NVM programs and systems, there is little attention protecting NVM data from software bugs and hardware errors. In this paper, we propose TENET, a new NVM programming framework, which guarantees memory safety and fault-tolerance to protect NVM data against software bugs and hardware errors. TENET provides the most popular Persistent Transactional Memory (PTM) programming model. TENET leverages the concurrency and commit-time guarantees of a PTM to provide performant and cost-efficient memory safety and fault tolerance. Our evaluations shows that TENET offers the protection for NVM data at a modest performance overhead and storage cost, as compared to other PTMs with partial or no memory safety and fault-tolerance support.
items.abstract_zh: 字节可寻址非易失性存储器 (NVM) 允许程序使用存储器接口直接访问存储，而无需通过昂贵的传统存储堆栈。然而，直接访问 NVM 会使 NVM 数据容易受到软件内存错误（内存安全）和硬件错误（容错）的影响。这个问题很关键，因为与 DRAM 不同，损坏的数据可能永远存在，即使在系统重新启动后也是如此。尽管对 NVM 程序和系统进行了大量研究，但很少有人关注保护 NVM 数据免受软件错误和硬件错误的影响。在本文中，我们提出了 TENET，一种新的 NVM 编程框架，它保证内存安全和容错，以保护 NVM 数据免受软件错误和硬件错误的影响。 TENET 提供了最流行的持久事务内存（PTM）编程模型。 TENET 利用 PTM 的并发性和提交时间保证来提供高性能且经济高效的内存安全性和容错能力。我们的评估表明，与其他部分或没有内存安全和容错支持的 PTM 相比，TENET 以适度的性能开销和存储成本提供了对 NVM 数据的保护。

items.title: Fast Application Launch on Personal Computing/Communication Devices.
items.abstract: We present Paralfetch, a novel prefetcher to speed up app launches on personal computing/communication devices by: 1) accurate collection of launch-related disk read requests, 2) pre-scheduling of these requests to improve I/O throughput during prefetching, and 3) overlapping app execution with disk prefetching for hiding disk access time from the app execution. We have implemented Paralfetch under Linux kernels on a desktop/laptop PC, a Raspberry Pi 3 board, and an Android smartphone. Tests with popular apps show that Paralfetch significantly reduces app launch times on flash-based drives, and outperforms GSoC Prefetch and FAST, which are representative app prefetchers available for Linux-based systems.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Paralfetch，一种新颖的预取器，可通过以下方式加速应用程序在个人计算/通信设备上的启动：1) 准确收集与启动相关的磁盘读取请求，2) 预先安排这些请求以提高预取期间的 I/O 吞吐量，3) 将应用程序执行与磁盘预取重叠，以隐藏应用程序执行的磁盘访问时间。我们已经在台式机/笔记本电脑、Raspberry Pi 3 板和 Android 智能手机上的 Linux 内核下实现了 Paralfetch。对流行应用程序的测试表明，Paralfetch 显着缩短了基于闪存的驱动器上的应用程序启动时间，并且性能优于 GSoC Prefetch 和 FAST（它们是可用于基于 Linux 的系统的代表性应用程序预取器）。

items.title: FUSEE: A Fully Memory-Disaggregated Key-Value Store.
items.abstract: Distributed in-memory key-value (KV) stores are embracing the disaggregated memory (DM) architecture for higher resource utilization. However, existing KV stores on DM employ a \emph{semi-disaggregated} design that stores KV pairs on DM but manages metadata with monolithic metadata servers, hence still suffering from low resource efficiency on metadata servers. To address this issue, this paper proposes FUSEE, a FUlly memory-diSaggrEgated KV StorE that brings disaggregation to metadata management. FUSEE replicates metadata, i.e., the index and memory management information, on memory nodes, manages them directly on the client side, and handles complex failures under the DM architecture. To scalably replicate the index on clients, FUSEE proposes a client-centric replication protocol that allows clients to concurrently access and modify the replicated index. To efficiently manage disaggregated memory, FUSEE adopts a two-level memory management scheme that splits the memory management duty among clients and memory nodes. Finally, to handle the metadata corruption under client failures, FUSEE leverages an embedded operation log scheme to repair metadata with low log maintenance overhead. We evaluate FUSEE with both micro and YCSB hybrid benchmarks. The experimental results show that FUSEE outperforms the state-of-the-art KV stores on DM by up to 4.5 times with less resource consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式内存中键值 (KV) 存储正在采用分解内存 (DM) 架构，以实现更高的资源利用率。然而，DM 上现有的 KV 存储采用半分解设计，将 KV 对存储在 DM 上，但使用整体元数据服务器管理元数据，因此元数据服务器上的资源效率仍然较低。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了 FUSEE，一种完全内存分解的 KV 存储，它为元数据管理带来了分解。 FUSEE将元数据，即索引和内存管理信息复制到内存节点上，直接在客户端进行管理，并在DM架构下处理复杂的故障。为了在客户端上可扩展地复制索引，FUSEE提出了一种以客户端为中心的复制协议，允许客户端同时访问和修改复制的索引。为了有效地管理分解内存，FUSEE采用两级内存管理方案，将内存管理职责分配给客户端和内存节点。最后，为了处理客户端故障下的元数据损坏，FUSEE 利用嵌入式操作日志方案以较低的日志维护开销修复元数据。我们使用 micro 和 YCSB 混合基准评估 FUSEE。实验结果表明，FUSEE 的性能比 DM 上最先进的 KV 存储高出 4.5 倍，而且资源消耗更少。

items.title: Revitalizing the Forgotten On-Chip DMA to Expedite Data Movement in NVM-based Storage Systems.
items.abstract: Data-intensive applications executing on NVM-based storage systems experience serious bottlenecks when moving data between DRAM and NVM. We advocate for the use of the long-existing but recently neglected on-chip DMA to expedite data movement with three contributions. First, we explore new latency-oriented optimization directions, driven by a comprehensive DMA study, to design a high-performance DMA module, which significantly lowers the I/O size threshold to observe benefits. Second, we propose a new data movement engine, Fastmove, that coordinates the use of the DMA along with the CPU with judicious scheduling and load splitting such that the DMA’s limitations are compensated, and the overall gains are maximized. Finally, with a general kernel-based design, simple APIs, and DAX file system integration, Fastmove allows applications to transparently exploit the DMA and its new features without code change. We run three data-intensive applications MySQL, GraphWalker, and Filebench atop NOVA, ext4-DAX, and XFS-DAX, with standard benchmarks like TPC-C, and popular graph algorithms like PageRank. Across single- and multi-socket settings, compared to the conventional CPU-only NVM accesses, Fastmove introduces to TPC-C with MySQL 1.13-2.16× speedups of peak throughput, reduces the average latency by 17.7-60.8%, and saves 37.1-68.9% CPU usage spent in data movement. It also shortens the execution time of graph algorithms with GraphWalker by 39.7-53.4%, and introduces 1.12-1.27× throughput speedups for Filebench.
items.abstract_zh: 在基于 NVM 的存储系统上执行的数据密集型应用程序在 DRAM 和 NVM 之间移动数据时会遇到严重的瓶颈。我们提倡使用长期存在但最近被忽视的片上 DMA 来加速数据移动，有以下三个贡献。首先，我们在全面的 DMA 研究的推动下探索新的面向延迟的优化方向，以设计高性能 DMA 模块，从而显着降低 I/O 大小阈值以观察效益。其次，我们提出了一种新的数据移动引擎 Fastmove，它通过明智的调度和负载分配来协调 DMA 与 CPU 的使用，从而补偿 DMA 的局限性，并使总体收益最大化。最后，凭借基于通用内核的设计、简单的 API 和 DAX 文件系统集成，Fastmove 允许应用程序透明地利用 DMA 及其新功能，而无需更改代码。我们在 NOVA、ext4-DAX 和 XFS-DAX 上运行三个数据密集型应用程序 MySQL、GraphWalker 和 Filebench，并使用 TPC-C 等标准基准测试和 PageRank 等流行的图形算法。在单插槽和多插槽设置中，与传统的仅 CPU NVM 访问相比，Fastmove 引入了 TPC-C with MySQL 1.13-2.16 倍的峰值吞吐量加速，平均延迟降低了 17.7-60.8%，并节省了 37.1-68.9% 的数据移动 CPU 使用率。它还将 GraphWalker 的图形算法的执行时间缩短了 39.7-53.4%，并为 Filebench 引入了 1.12-1.27 倍的吞吐量加速。

items.title: Building and Operating a Pretty Big Storage System (My Adventures in Amazon S3).
items.abstract: Five years ago I decided to leave my faculty position at UBC and join Amazon. A lot of that time has been spent working as an engineer on the S3 team. In this talk, I'm going to reflect on some of my experiences working on a cloud storage service, and in particular talk about what it's been like to build storage at the scale of S3. Now, we all know that S3 is pretty big and so it's probably not all that surprising to hear that I expected "scale" to be something that I'd learn a fair bit about when I decided to join. I was, however, a little surprised at some of the ways that scale would really factor into my role, and how it would show up in operating the business. So in the talk, we'll learn about building storage on large quantities of hard drives, and we'll also learn about some of the cultural, organizational, and personal dimensions of building, evolving, and running a really big storage system.
items.abstract_zh: 五年前，我决定辞去 UBC 的教职并加入亚马逊。大部分时间都花在了 S3 团队的工程师身上。在本次演讲中，我将回顾我在云存储服务方面的一些工作经验，特别是谈论构建 S3 规模的存储的感受。现在，我们都知道 S3 相当大，所以当我决定加入时，听到我预计“规模”是我能学到很多知识的东西，这可能并不奇怪。然而，我对规模在我的角色中真正发挥作用的某些方式以及它在业务运营中的表现方式感到有点惊讶。因此，在演讲中，我们将了解如何在大量硬盘驱动器上构建存储，我们还将了解构建、发展和运行真正大型存储系统的一些文化、组织和个人维度。

items.title: On Stacking a Persistent Memory File System on Legacy File Systems.
items.abstract: In this work, we design and implement a Stackable Persistent memory File System (SPFS), which serves NVMM as a persistent writeback cache to NVMM-oblivious filesystems. SPFS can be stacked on a disk-optimized file system to improve I/O performance by absorbing frequent order-preserving small synchronous writes in NVMM while also exploiting the VFS cache of the underlying disk-optimized file system for non-synchronous writes. A stackable file system must be lightweight in that it manages only NVMM and not the disk or VFS cache. Therefore, SPFS manages all file system metadata including extents using simple but highly efficient dynamic hash tables. To manage extents using hash tables, we design a novel Extent Hashing algorithm that exhibits fast insertion as well as fast scan performance. Our performance study shows that SPFS effectively improves I/O performance of the lower file system by up to 9.9×.
items.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们设计并实现了一个可堆叠持久内存文件系统（SPFS），它将 NVMM 作为 NVMM 不可见文件系统的持久写回缓存。 SPFS 可以堆叠在磁盘优化的文件系统上，通过吸收 NVMM 中频繁的保序小型同步写入来提高 I/O 性能，同时还利用底层磁盘优化文件系统的 VFS 缓存进行非同步写入。可堆叠文件系统必须是轻量级的，因为它仅管理 NVMM，而不管理磁盘或 VFS 缓存。因此，SPFS 使用简单但高效的动态哈希表来管理包括范围在内的所有文件系统元数据。为了使用哈希表管理范围，我们设计了一种新颖的范围散列算法，该算法具有快速插入和快速扫描性能。我们的性能研究表明，SPFS 有效地将下层文件系统的 I/O 性能提高了 9.9 倍。

items.title: Patronus: High-Performance and Protective Remote Memory.
items.abstract: RDMA-enabled remote memory (RM) systems are gaining popularity with improved memory utilization and elasticity. However, since it is commonly believed that fine-grained RDMA permission management is impractical, existing RM systems forgo memory protection, an indispensable property in a real-world deployment. In this paper, we propose PATRONUS, an RM system that can simultaneously offer protection and high performance. PATRONUS introduces a fast permission management mechanism by exploiting advanced RDMA hardware features with a set of elaborate software techniques. Moreover, to retain the high performance under exception scenarios (e.g., client failures, illegal access), PATRONUS attaches microsecond-scaled leases to permission and reserves spare RDMA resources for fast recovery. We evaluate PATRONUS over two one-sided data structures and two function-as-a-service (FaaS) applications. The experiment shows that the protection only brings 2.4% to 27.7% overhead among all the workloads, and our system performs at most ×5.2 than the best competitor.
items.abstract_zh: 随着内存利用率和弹性的提高，支持 RDMA 的远程内存 (RM) 系统越来越受欢迎。然而，由于人们普遍认为细粒度的 RDMA 权限管理不切实际，因此现有的 RM 系统放弃了内存保护，而内存保护是现实部署中不可或缺的属性。在本文中，我们提出了PATRONUS，一种可以同时提供保护和高性能的RM系统。 PATRONUS 通过利用先进的 RDMA 硬件功能和一组精心设计的软件技术，引入了快速权限管理机制。此外，为了在异常情况下（例如客户端故障、非法访问）保持高性能，PATRONUS将微秒级的租约附加到权限上，并保留备用的RDMA资源以用于快速恢复。我们通过两个单方面的数据结构和两个功能即服务（FaaS）应用程序来评估 PATRONUS。实验表明，这种保护只带来了所有工作负载的2.4%到27.7%的开销，而我们的系统的性能最多比最好的竞争对手高出5.2倍。

items.title: λ-IO: A Unified IO Stack for Computational Storage.
items.abstract: The emerging computational storage device offers an opportunity for in-storage computing. It alleviates the overhead of data movement between the host and the device, and thus accelerates data-intensive applications. In this paper, we present λ-IO, a unified IO stack managing both computation and storage resources across the host and the device. We propose a set of designs – interface, runtime, and scheduling – to tackle three critical issues. We implement λ-IO in full-stack software and hardware environment, and evaluate it with synthetic and real applications against Linux IO, showing up to 5.12× performance improvement.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的计算存储设备为存储内计算提供了机会。它减轻了主机和设备之间数据移动的开销，从而加速数据密集型应用程序。在本文中，我们提出了 λ-IO，这是一个统一的 IO 堆栈，用于管理主机和设备上的计算和存储资源。我们提出了一套设计——界面、运行时和调度——来解决三个关键问题。我们在全栈软件和硬件环境中实现了 λ-IO，并通过针对 Linux IO 的综合和真实应用对其进行了评估，显示出高达 5.12 倍的性能提升。

items.title: GL-Cache: Group-level learning for efficient and high-performance caching.
items.abstract: Web applications rely heavily on software caches to achieve low-latency, high-throughput services. To adapt to changing workloads, three types of learned caches (learned evictions) have been designed in recent years: object-level learning, learning-from-distribution, and learning-from-simple-experts. However, we argue that the learning granularity in existing approaches is either too fine (object-level), incurring significant computation and storage overheads, or too coarse (workload or expert-level) to capture the differences between objects and leaves a considerable efficiency gap. In this work, we propose a new approach for learning in caches (group-level learning), which clusters similar objects into groups and performs learning and eviction at the group level. Learning at the group level accumulates more signals for learning, leverages more features with adaptive weights, and amortizes overheads over objects, thereby achieving both high efficiency and high throughput. We designed and implemented GL-Cache on an open-source production cache to demonstrate group-level learning. Evaluations on 118 production block I/O and CDN cache traces show that GL-Cache has a higher hit ratio and higher throughput than state-of-the-art designs. Compared to LRB (object-level learning), GL-Cache improves throughput by 228$\times$ and hit ratio by 7\% on average across cache sizes. For 10\% of the traces (P90), GL-Cache provides a 25\% hit ratio increase from LRB. Compared to the best of all learned caches, GL-Cache achieves a 64\% higher throughput, a 3\% higher hit ratio on average, and a 13\% hit ratio increase at the P90.
items.abstract_zh: Web 应用程序严重依赖软件缓存来实现低延迟、高吞吐量的服务。为了适应不断变化的工作负载，近年来设计了三种类型的学习缓存（学习驱逐）：对象级学习、分布学习和简单专家学习。然而，我们认为现有方法中的学习粒度要么太细（对象级），导致大量的计算和存储开销，要么太粗（工作负载或专家级），无法捕获对象之间的差异，并留下相当大的效率差距。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在缓存中学习的新方法（组级学习），它将相似的对象聚类成组，并在组级执行学习和驱逐。群体层面的学习可以积累更多的学习信号，通过自适应权重利用更多的特征，并分摊对象的开销，从而实现高效率和高吞吐量。我们在开源生产缓存上设计并实现了 GL-Cache，以演示组级学习。对 118 个生产块 I/O 和 CDN 缓存跟踪的评估表明，GL-Cache 比最先进的设计具有更高的命中率和吞吐量。与 LRB（对象级学习）相比，GL-Cache 在不同缓存大小上平均将吞吐量提高了 228$\times$，命中率提高了 7\%。对于 10% 的跟踪 (P90)，GL-Cache 的命中率比 LRB 提高了 25%。与所有学习缓存中最好的相比，GL-Cache 的吞吐量提高了 64%，平均命中率提高了 3%，在 P90 上命中率提高了 13%。

items.title: ADOC: Automatically Harmonizing Dataflow Between Components in Log-Structured Key-Value Stores for Improved Performance.
items.abstract: Log-Structure Merge-tree (LSM) based Key-Value (KV) systems are widely deployed. A widely acknowledged problem with LSM-KVs is write stalls, which refers to sudden performance drops under heavy write pressure. Prior studies have attributed write stalls to a particular cause such as a resource shortage or a scheduling issue. In this paper, we conduct a systematic study on the causes of write stalls by evaluating RocksDB with a variety of storage devices and show that the conclusions that focus on the individual aspects, though valid, are not generally applicable. Through a thorough review and further experiments with RocksDB, we show that data overflow, which refers to the rapid expansion of one or more components in an LSM-KV system due to a surge in data flow into one of the components, is able to explain the formation of write stalls. We contend that by balancing and harmonizing data flow among components, we will be able to reduce data overflow and thus, write stalls. As evidence, we propose a tuning framework called ADOC (Automatic Data Overflow Control) that automatically adjusts the system configurations, specifically, the number of threads and the batch size, to minimize data overflow in RocksDB. Our extensive experimental evaluations with RocksDB show that ADOC reduces the duration of write stalls by as much as 87.9% and improves performance by as much as 322.8% compared with the auto-tuned RocksDB. Compared to the manually optimized state-of-the-art SILK, ADOC achieves up to 66% higher throughput for the synthetic write-intensive workload that we used, while achieving comparable performance for the real-world YCSB workloads. However, SILK has to use over 20% more DRAM on average.
items.abstract_zh: 基于日志结构合并树（LSM）的键值（KV）系统被广泛部署。 LSM-KV 的一个广泛承认的问题是写入停顿，这是指在高写入压力下性能突然下降。先前的研究已将写入停顿归因于特定原因，例如资源短缺或调度问题。在本文中，我们通过对多种存储设备的RocksDB进行评估，对写入停顿的原因进行了系统的研究，结果表明，侧重于个别方面的结论虽然有效，但并不普遍适用。通过对 RocksDB 的彻底审查和进一步实验，我们表明数据溢出（指 LSM-KV 系统中的一个或多个组件由于流入其中一个组件的数据激增而导致的快速扩展）能够解释写入停顿的形成。我们认为，通过平衡和协调组件之间的数据流，我们将能够减少数据溢出，从而减少写入停顿。作为证据，我们提出了一个名为 ADOC（自动数据溢出控制）的调优框架，该框架会自动调整系统配置，特别是线程数和批处理大小，以最大限度地减少 RocksDB 中的数据溢出。我们对 RocksDB 进行的广泛实验评估表明，与自动调优的 RocksDB 相比，ADOC 将写入停顿持续时间减少了 87.9%，性能提高了 322.8%。与手动优化的最先进的 SILK 相比，ADOC 为我们使用的合成写入密集型工作负载实现了高达 66% 的高吞吐量，同时为现实世​​界的 YCSB 工作负载实现了相当的性能。然而，SILK 平均需要多使用 20% 以上的 DRAM。

items.title: Multi-view Feature-based SSD Failure Prediction: What, When, and Why.
items.abstract: Solid state drives (SSDs) play an important role in large-scale data centers. SSD failures affect the stability of storage systems and cause additional maintenance overhead. To predict and handle SSD failures in advance, this paper proposes a multi-view and multi-task random forest (MVTRF) scheme. MVTRF predicts SSD failures based on multi-view features extracted from both long-term and short-term monitoring data of SSDs. Particularly, multi-task learning is adopted to simultaneously predict what type of failure it is and when it will occur through the same model. We also extract the key decisions of MVTRF to analyze why the failure will occur. These details of failure would be useful for verifying and handling SSD failures. The proposed MVTRF is evaluated on the large-scale real data from data centers. The experimental results show that MVTRF has higher failure prediction accuracy and improves precision by 46.1% and recall by 57.4% on average compared with the existing schemes. The results also demonstrate the effectiveness of MVTRF on failure type and time prediction and failure cause identification, which helps to improve the efficiency of failure handling.
items.abstract_zh: 固态硬盘（SSD）在大型数据中心中发挥着重要作用。 SSD故障会影响存储系统的稳定性并带来额外的维护开销。为了提前预测和处理SSD故障，本文提出了一种多视图多任务随机森林（MVTRF）方案。 MVTRF基于从SSD的长期和短期监测数据中提取的多视图特征来预测SSD故障。特别是，采用多任务学习，通过同一模型同时预测故障类型以及何时发生。我们还提取了 MVTRF 的关键决策来分析为什么会发生故障。这些故障详细信息对于验证和处理 SSD 故障非常有用。所提出的 MVTRF 在来自数据中心的大规模真实数据上进行评估。实验结果表明，MVTRF具有更高的故障预测精度，与现有方案相比，准确率平均提高了46.1%，召回率平均提高了57.4%。结果还证明了MVRTF在故障类型和时间预测以及故障原因识别方面的有效性，有助于提高故障处理效率。

items.title: MadFS: Per-File Virtualization for Userspace Persistent Memory Filesystems.
items.abstract: Persistent memory (PM) can be accessed directly from userspace without kernel involvement, but most PM filesystems still perform metadata operations in the kernel for security and rely on the kernel for cross-process synchronization. We present per-file virtualization, where a virtualization layer implements a complete set of file functionalities, including metadata management, crash consistency, and concurrency control, in userspace. We observe that not all file metadata need to be maintained by the kernel and propose embedding insensitive metadata into the file for userspace management. For crash consistency, copy-on-write (CoW) benefits from the embedding of the block mapping since the mapping can be efficiently updated without kernel involvement. For cross-process synchronization, we introduce lock-free optimistic concurrency control (OCC) at user level, which tolerates process crashes and provides better scalability. Based on per-file virtualization, we implement MadFS, a library PM filesystem that maintains the embedded metadata as a compact log. Experimental results show that on concurrent workloads, MadFS achieves up to 3.6× the throughput of ext4-DAX. For real-world applications, MadFS provides up to 48% speedup for YCSB on LevelDB and 85% for TPC-C on SQLite compared to NOVA.
items.abstract_zh: 持久内存（PM）可以直接从用户空间访问，无需内核参与，但大多数 PM 文件系统出于安全考虑仍然在内核中执行元数据操作，并依赖内核进行跨进程同步。我们提出了每文件虚拟化，其中虚拟化层在用户空间中实现了一整套文件功能，包括元数据管理、崩溃一致性和并发控制。我们观察到并非所有文件元数据都需要由内核维护，并建议将不敏感的元数据嵌入到文件中以进行用户空间管理。为了实现崩溃一致性，写时复制 (CoW) 受益于块映射的嵌入，因为无需内核参与即可有效更新映射。对于跨进程同步，我们在用户级别引入了无锁乐观并发控制（OCC），它可以容忍进程崩溃并提供更好的可扩展性。基于每个文件虚拟化，我们实现了 MadFS，这是一个库 PM 文件系统，它将嵌入式元数据维护为紧凑日志。实验结果表明，在并发工作负载上，MadFS 的吞吐量高达 ext4-DAX 的 3.6 倍。对于实际应用程序，与 NOVA 相比，MadFS 为 LevelDB 上的 YCSB 提供高达 48% 的加速，为 SQLite 上的 TPC-C 提供高达 85% 的加速。

items.title: SMRSTORE: A Storage Engine for Cloud Object Storage on HM-SMR Drives.
items.abstract: Cloud object storage vendors are always in pursuit of better cost efficiency. Emerging Shingled Magnetic Recording (SMR) drives are becoming economically favorable in archival storage systems due to significantly improved areal density. However, for standard-class object storage, previous studies and our preliminary exploration revealed that the existing SMR drive solutions can experience severe throughput variations due to garbage collection (GC). In this paper, we introduce SMRSTORE, an SMR-based storage engine for standard-class object storage without compromising performance or durability. The key features of SMRSTORE include directly implementing chunk store interfaces over SMR drives, using a complete log-structured design, and applying guided data placement to reduce GC for consistent performance. The evaluation shows that SMRSTORE delivers comparable performance as Ext4 on the Conventional Magnetic Recording (CMR) drives, and can be up to 2.16x faster than F2FS on SMR drives. By switching to SMR drives, we have decreased the total cost by up to 15% and provided performance on par with the prior system for customers. Currently, we have deployed SMRSTORE in standard-class Alibaba Cloud Object Storage Service (OSS) to store hundreds of PBs of data. We plan to use SMR drives for all classes of OSS in the near future.
items.abstract_zh: 云对象存储厂商始终追求更好的成本效率。由于显着提高了面密度，新兴的叠瓦式磁记录 (SMR) 驱动器在档案存储系统中变得经济上有利。然而，对于标准级对象存储，之前的研究和我们的初步探索表明，现有的 SMR 驱动解决方案可能会因垃圾收集 (GC) 而出现严重的吞吐量变化。在本文中，我们介绍了 SMRSTORE，这是一种基于 SMR 的存储引擎，用于标准级对象存储，而不影响性能或耐用性。 SMRSTORE 的主要功能包括通过 SMR 驱动器直接实现块存储接口、使用完整的日志结构设计以及应用引导数据放置来减少 GC 以实现一致的性能。评估表明，SMRSTORE 在传统磁记录 (CMR) 驱动器上提供与 Ext4 相当的性能，并且比 SMR 驱动器上的 F2FS 快 2.16 倍。通过改用 SMR 驱动器，我们将总成本降低了 15%，并为客户提供了与之前系统相当的性能。目前，我们已在标准级阿里云对象存储服务（OSS）中部署了SMRSTORE，可存储数百PB的数据。我们计划在不久的将来将 SMR 驱动器用于所有类别的 OSS。

items.title: 21st USENIX Conference on File and Storage Technologies, FAST 2023, Santa Clara, CA, USA, February 21-23, 2023.
items.abstract: 21st USENIX Conference on File and Storage Technologies (FAST '23), February 21–23, 2023, Hyatt Regency Santa Clara, Santa Clara, CA, USA. FAST brings together storage-system researchers and practitioners to explore new directions in the design, implementation, evaluation, and deployment of storage systems.
items.abstract_zh: 第 21 届 USENIX 文件和存储技术会议 (FAST '23)，2023 年 2 月 21 日至 23 日，美国加利福尼亚州圣克拉拉圣克拉拉凯悦酒店。 FAST 将存储系统研究人员和从业者聚集在一起，探索存储系统设计、实施、评估和部署的新方向。
